BackstoryDef.title: field medic's apprentice
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was taken on as an apprentice by a Dominion military medic at a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] learned field medicine before [PAWN_pronoun] learned anything else and found [PAWN_pronoun] preferred it that way.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate medical trainee
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was selected for a Dominion corporate medical training program and spent [PAWN_possessive] childhood learning anatomy, treatment, and triage. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the program produced medics first and people second.

BackstoryDef.title: military hospital aide
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in a Dominion military hospital from a young age, assisting with treatments and procedures that most children never see. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to work quickly and without flinching.

BackstoryDef.title: combat medicine student
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studied combat medicine in one of the Dominion's military academies, learning to treat injuries under conditions that made clinical training look comfortable. [PAWN_pronoun] graduated near the top of [PAWN_possessive] class.

BackstoryDef.title: triage assistant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] assisted at a Dominion military triage station from an early age, learning to assess injuries quickly and make decisions that could not be unmade. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that speed and accuracy are not mutually exclusive if you practice long enough.

BackstoryDef.title: military engineering student
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was enrolled in a Dominion military engineering program from a young age, learning the construction and demolition techniques that the corporate military considered essential. [PAWN_pronoun] found [PAWN_pronoun] preferred building things to destroying them, though [PAWN_pronoun] became equally proficient at both.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate construction trainee
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] trained in the Dominion's corporate construction division from childhood, learning to build military installations and fortifications to precise specifications. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that in the Dominion, everything built serves a purpose and the purpose is rarely what it appears.

BackstoryDef.title: demolitions apprentice
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] apprenticed in a Dominion military demolitions unit from an early age, learning the precise application of destructive force. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a thorough understanding of structures by learning exactly how to bring them down.

BackstoryDef.title: fortification builder's child
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up around the military fortification projects of a Dominion installation, learning construction techniques from the engineers who built them. [PAWN_pronoun] was building independently before [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough to be officially employed.

BackstoryDef.title: technical academy cadet
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] attended a Dominion military technical academy, learning the engineering and mechanical skills that the corporate military considered essential to its operations. [PAWN_pronoun] graduated with a comprehensive understanding of how things are built and how they fail.

BackstoryDef.title: officer academy cadet
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was enrolled in a Dominion officer academy from a young age, learning the leadership, strategy, and command disciplines that the corporate military considers essential. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled and learned early that command is a different skill from competence.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate military heir
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised to follow a family tradition of Dominion military service at officer rank. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the expectations, the protocols, and the privileges of that position before [PAWN_pronoun] learned whether [PAWN_pronoun] wanted any of them.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion strategy student
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studied military strategy and corporate tactics in one of the Dominion's elite academies, learning to think about conflict as a system of resources, objectives, and acceptable losses. [PAWN_pronoun] was good at it and found the last part the most instructive.

BackstoryDef.title: command training initiate
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was selected for a Dominion command training program on the basis of demonstrated leadership aptitude. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to give orders that people followed and to take responsibility for what happened when they did.

BackstoryDef.title: military leadership student
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] attended a Dominion military leadership program, learning the specific disciplines required to command soldiers in corporate operations. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that leadership in the Dominion's military and leadership in any other context are related but not identical skills.
